content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(0, 9, 0), (2, 5, 1), (8, 9, 1), (7, 8, 2), (1, 9, 5), (2, 9, 5), (1, 5, 10), (4, 5, 12), (1, 3, 15), (2, 7, 16), (6, 9, 16), (1, 4, 17), (1, 8, 20), (0, 2, 24), (5, 8, 26)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 8 exactly at time 26.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

* Edge (0, 9, 0) has node 0 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (2, 5, 1) has node 2 and time 1. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (8, 9, 1) has node 8 and time 1. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (7, 8, 2) has node 7 and time 2. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 9, 5) has node 1 and time 5. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 9, 5) has node 2 and time 5. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 5, 10) has node 1 and time 10. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 5, 12) has node 4 and time 12. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (1, 3, 15) has node 1 and time 15. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (2, 7, 16) has node 2 and time 16. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (6, 9, 16) has node 6 and time 16. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 4, 17) has node 1 and time 17. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (1, 8, 20) has node 1 and time 20. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 2, 24) has node 0 and time 24. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (5, 8, 26) has node 5 and time 26. -> Add node 8.

The nodes matched are 5, 9, and 8.

Answer: [5, 9, 8]
